trust.guaranteeText: Guaranteed for up to 10 years (selected ranges include 5 or 7 years)

pricing.pricingDisclaimer: Final install pricing depends on boiler size, flue changes, and controls package.

financeExample.summary: Finance available over 3, 5, 8, and 10 years. Interest rates are discussed at quote appointment.

proofCards.reviewSnippet: Installation team was fast, tidy, and highly professional.
Helpful advice on controls and ongoing maintenance.

faqs.question: Can you install on weekends?
faqs.answer: Weekend installation dates are available depending on survey outcome and boiler stock.

faqs.question: What warranties are included?
faqs.answer: Installations are guaranteed for up to 10 years depending on selected boiler range.

seo.title: Boiler Installation in Hayes | Empire Home Solutions
seo.description: Boiler installation in Hayes with clear fixed quotes, financing over 3, 5, 8, and 10 years, and Gas Safe-certified engineers.
